title: [BUG] Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Cannot read property 'F_OK' of undefined
author: ravitejamuddada
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

I am trying to use excel js for doing different operations on excel file on client side using vanilla JS. In order to start with a simple usecase , I have tried converting the excel data into JSON using the below snippet . But when I load my page in browser I'm seeing the below error 

in my package.json
"exceljs": "^4.2.1"

## Error

exceljs.min.js:3 Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Cannot read property 'F_OK' of undefined
    at eval (exceljs.min.js:3)
    at new Promise (<anonymous>)
    at Object.exists (exceljs.min.js:3)
    at t.eval (exceljs.min.js:3)
    at f (exceljs.min.js:17)
    at Generator.eval [as _invoke] (exceljs.min.js:17)
    at Generator.eval [as next] (exceljs.min.js:17)
    at i (exceljs.min.js:3)
    at s (exceljs.min.js:3)
    at eval (exceljs.min.js:3)

```
const excel = require("exceljs");
//Read a file
var workbook = new excel.Workbook();
workbook.xlsx.readFile("../assets/book.xlsx").then(function () {

const json = JSON.stringify(workbook.model);
console.log(json);

```

comments.author: imatwork
